text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass doors create a threshold between the known and the unknown, inviting me into a realm dedicated to research and development. Inside, the vibrant colors and illuminated screens suggest a celebration of innovation and collective knowledge—a modern temple to human creativity. There is a quiet excitement in the air, as if every object and word is waiting to spark a new idea or insight within me. I feel both small and connected, aware that I am part of the ongoing story of discovery.
